'''Keder''', also known as '''Keder the Black''', was a highly-paid [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] and [[Spy/Legends|spy]] during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="CL" /> On the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] planet of the Republic,<ref name="Coruscant">{{DB|location|coruscant|Coruscant}}</ref> Keder infiltrated the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] in the disguise of a [[Senate Guard/Legends|Senate Guard]]. The identity of both Keder's employer and his target were a mystery to all but himself. During his infiltration of the Senate, Keder wore a [[Color/Legends|black]] Senate Guard helmet and [[Robe/Legends|robes]] and wielded an [[Mk II Paladin blaster rifle/Legends|MK II Paladin blaster rifle]]. Keder also possessed a level of [[Force-attunement|attunement]] to [[The Force/Legends|the Force]].<ref name="CL" />

==Behind the scenes==
Keder appeared on a card for [[2001]]'s ''[[Coruscant Limited]]'' expansion set of [[Decipher]]'s [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]].<ref name="CL" />
